nodes.title: Release build, distribution, and LLM agent integration
nodes.description: Set up cross-platform release builds (GoReleaser), CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions), distribution channels (Homebrew tap), Claude Code plugin for /plugin discovery, and LLM agent kit with MCP configs and skill files. Includes supply chain security (cosign signing, reproducible builds, pinned dependencies) and release documentation (VDD, build environment baseline, metrics).
nodes.creator: cli

nodes.title: GoReleaser and CI/CD pipeline
nodes.description: Set up automated cross-platform builds and continuous integration. GoReleaser produces 6 platform binaries (darwin/linux/windows x amd64/arm64) with cosign signing. GitHub Actions runs tests, lint, and coverage on every push, and publishes releases on tag push.
nodes.creator: cli

nodes.title: Create .goreleaser.yaml with cosign signing
nodes.description: GoReleaser config for cross-platform binary releases with Sigstore cosign signing for supply chain integrity.
nodes.prompt: Create .goreleaser.yaml at repo root. Build ./cmd/mtix/ with CGO_ENABLED=0 and -trimpath. Targets: darwin/linux/windows x amd64/arm64. Use CommitDate (not Date) for reproducible builds in ldflags: -X main.version={{.Version}} -X main.commit={{.ShortCommit}} -X main.date={{.CommitDate}}. Archives: tar.gz for darwin/linux, zip for windows, include LICENSE, NOTICE, README.md. Checksums: sha256 in checksums.txt. Add signs: section with cosign sign-blob (keyless OIDC). Add extra_files for mtix-agent-kit tarball. Verify with: goreleaser release --snapshot --clean.
nodes.acceptance: 1. goreleaser release --snapshot --clean produces 6 binaries. 2. Each binary shows correct version via ./mtix version. 3. Checksums.txt is generated. 4. Two consecutive builds produce identical binary checksums (reproducible). 5. cosign signs section is present in config.
nodes.creator: cli

nodes.title: Create CI workflow
nodes.description: GitHub Actions CI pipeline running tests, lint, and build on every push and PR.
nodes.prompt: Create .github/workflows/ci.yml. Triggers: push to main, pull_request to main. All actions pinned to commit SHAs (not tags). Add permissions: contents: read at workflow level. Jobs: (1) test-go: matrix ubuntu-22.04 + macos-latest, setup-go 1.25, go mod verify, go test ./... -race -count=1. (2) test-web: setup-node 22, cd web && npm ci && npx vitest run. (3) lint: golangci-lint-action pinned to SHA. (4) build: depends on test-go, test-web, lint; builds web (npm ci && npm run build), copies dist to internal/web/dist/, runs go build -trimpath ./cmd/mtix/, verifies ./mtix version output. Lock all runners to ubuntu-22.04 (not ubuntu-latest).
nodes.acceptance: 1. CI runs on push to main. 2. CI runs on PRs. 3. All actions pinned to SHA with tag comment. 4. permissions: contents: read is set. 5. Tests, lint, and build all execute. 6. Runner images are pinned versions.
nodes.creator: cli

nodes.title: Create release workflow
nodes.description: GitHub Actions release pipeline triggered by version tags, with quality gates and manual approval.
nodes.prompt: Create .github/workflows/release.yml. Trigger: push tag v*.*.*. Permissions: contents: write, id-token: write (for cosign OIDC). Jobs: (1) preflight: go test -race, go test -coverprofile, npm ci && npx vitest run, golangci-lint, go mod verify. Tag-based coverage gate: if tag contains -beta or -rc, min 85%; else min 90%. Fail if git working tree is dirty. (2) release: environment: production (manual approval gate). Build web UI. SHA256 the web dist/ directory. npm audit --audit-level=high as hard gate. Generate BUILD-ENVIRONMENT.json (Go version, Node version, GoReleaser version, runner OS, commit hash). Run scripts/build-agent-kit.sh. Independent reference build: go build with same ldflags, compare checksum to GoReleaser output (BEFORE signing). Run goreleaser release --clean. Export mtix tasks.json and test results as release artifacts. Run scripts/generate-vdd.sh. (3) update-homebrew: repository-dispatch to hyper-swe/homebrew-tap. All actions pinned to commit SHAs.
nodes.acceptance: 1. Workflow triggers on v*.*.* tags only. 2. Manual approval gate via environment: production. 3. Coverage gate is tag-aware (85% beta, 90% GA). 4. Dirty tree check fails the build. 5. Web dist SHA256 is computed. 6. npm audit is a hard gate. 7. Dual-build comparison runs before signing. 8. BUILD-ENVIRONMENT.json is generated. 9. VDD is generated. 10. Tasks.json exported as artifact.
nodes.creator: cli

nodes.title: Add Dependabot config for GitHub Actions
nodes.description: Auto-update pinned action SHAs when new versions are released.
nodes.prompt: Create .github/dependabot.yml with package-ecosystem: github-actions, directory: /, schedule: interval: weekly.
nodes.acceptance: 1. File exists at .github/dependabot.yml. 2. Configured for github-actions ecosystem. 3. Weekly update schedule.
nodes.creator: cli

nodes.title: Update .gitignore and Makefile for release targets
nodes.description: Add dist/ to .gitignore and add release-related Makefile targets.
nodes.prompt: Add dist/ to .gitignore. Add Makefile targets: generate-plugin-skills (renders templates to .claude-plugin/skills/), agent-kit (builds the agent kit tarball). Ensure npm ci is used instead of npm install in all Makefile web targets.
nodes.acceptance: 1. dist/ is in .gitignore. 2. make generate-plugin-skills works. 3. make agent-kit produces tarball. 4. All web targets use npm ci.
nodes.creator: cli

nodes.title: Fix Windows cross-compilation for syscall.Flock
nodes.description: GoReleaser Windows builds fail because sync_service.go uses Unix-only syscall.Flock. Extract file locking into build-tagged platform files.
nodes.prompt: Move fileFd, acquireLock, releaseLock from internal/service/sync_service.go into flock_unix.go (//go:build !windows) and flock_windows.go (//go:build windows). Add lockShared and lockExclusive constants to replace direct syscall.LOCK_SH/LOCK_EX usage. Remove syscall import from sync_service.go. Update callers to use lockShared/lockExclusive constants.
nodes.acceptance: 1. goreleaser release --snapshot --clean builds all 6 targets including Windows. 2. Unix tests pass. 3. No syscall import in sync_service.go.
nodes.creator: cli

nodes.title: Release documentation and compliance artifacts
nodes.description: Auto-generate release documentation: Version Description Document (VDD) with changelog, artifact inventory, known issues, and upgrade instructions. Build environment baseline (BUILD-ENVIRONMENT.json) recording exact tool versions. Metrics report with per-package coverage.
nodes.creator: cli

nodes.title: Create VDD generation script
nodes.description: Auto-generate a Version Description Document for each release containing version, changelog, artifact inventory, known issues, metrics, and upgrade/rollback instructions.
nodes.prompt: Create scripts/generate-vdd.sh. Inputs: git tag, checksums.txt path, mtix binary path. Outputs: VDD-v{version}.md. Sections: (1) Version identifier and date. (2) Changelog from git log between previous tag and current tag. (3) Artifact inventory with checksums from checksums.txt. (4) Known issues from mtix list --status open,blocked --json. (5) Per-package coverage from go test -coverprofile. (6) Test count and pass rate. (7) Upgrade instructions: mtix export, install new binary, mtix verify. (8) Rollback: reinstall old binary, mtix import backup.
nodes.acceptance: 1. Script produces valid markdown. 2. Changelog section populated from git log. 3. Known issues populated from mtix. 4. Metrics section has coverage by package. 5. Upgrade/rollback instructions present.
nodes.creator: cli

nodes.title: Create BUILD-ENVIRONMENT.json generation
nodes.description: Record exact build tool versions as a release artifact for reproducibility.
nodes.prompt: In the release workflow, generate BUILD-ENVIRONMENT.json containing: go_version (from go version), node_version (from node --version), goreleaser_version, runner_os, runner_arch, commit_hash, tag_name, build_timestamp (SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH from git commit). Write as a step in release.yml, attach as release artifact.
nodes.acceptance: 1. JSON file contains all specified fields. 2. Attached as release artifact. 3. go_version matches the setup-go version.
nodes.creator: cli

nodes.title: Add release metrics and traceability exports
nodes.description: Export mtix task state and test results as release artifacts for requirements traceability.
nodes.prompt: In the release workflow, add steps: (1) mtix export to produce tasks.json, attach as release artifact. (2) go test -json ./... > test-results.json, attach as release artifact. (3) go test -coverprofile=coverage.out, attach as release artifact.
nodes.acceptance: 1. tasks.json attached to release. 2. test-results.json attached. 3. coverage.out attached.
nodes.creator: cli

Create .claude-plugin/.mcp.json: mcpServers.mtix with command mtix, args [mcp, --project, .]. All JSON must be valid and parseable.

Use the existing templates from internal/docs/templates/skills/ rendered with ProjectPrefix=PROJ as the generic placeholder. These are static committed files, not templates.

nodes.title: LLM agent kit
nodes.description: Package downloadable agent kit (tar.gz) attached to each GitHub Release containing skill files, MCP configs for multiple IDE clients, and Codex AGENTS.md. Includes per-file integrity manifest (MANIFEST.sha256).
nodes.creator: cli

nodes.title: Create Codex AGENTS.md
nodes.description: Setup instructions for OpenAI Codex agents to use mtix for task management.
nodes.prompt: Create docs/codex/AGENTS.md. Sections: (1) Setup: install mtix, run mtix init --prefix PROJ. (2) Task workflow: mtix list --status ready, mtix context <id>, mtix claim <id> --agent codex, do work, mtix done <id>. (3) Rules: always read context chain before work, never skip task creation, report blockers with mtix blocked. Keep instructions concise and actionable for an LLM agent.
nodes.acceptance: 1. File exists at docs/codex/AGENTS.md. 2. Contains setup, workflow, and rules sections. 3. All mtix commands are correct and functional.
nodes.creator: cli

nodes.prompt: Create scripts/build-agent-kit.sh. Takes VERSION as argument. Creates mtix-agent-kit-v{VERSION}/ directory containing: skills/ (copied from .claude-plugin/skills/), mcp-config/ (copied from docs/mcp-config/), codex/AGENTS.md (copied from docs/codex/), README.md (setup instructions). Generates MANIFEST.sha256 with sha256sum of every file. Creates mtix-agent-kit-v{VERSION}.tar.gz in dist/.
nodes.acceptance: 1. Script runs with VERSION=0.1.0. 2. Tarball contains all expected directories. 3. MANIFEST.sha256 lists every file with correct hashes. 4. Tarball is in dist/.

Include: Homebrew (brew install hyper-swe/tap/mtix), Binary Download (link to GitHub Releases), Go Install (go install github.com/hyper-swe/mtix/cmd/mtix@latest), Claude Code Plugin (/plugin marketplace add hyper-swe/mtix).

nodes.acceptance: 1. Coverage section documents both thresholds. 2. Tag-based enforcement is explained. 3. Rationale is included.
